subcategory: real-time notification center with phone mockup
use_cases: Display real-time payment notifications in a dashboard interface
Show activity alerts and updates in a mobile app preview
Serve as a notification center for fintech and payment platforms
Provide a sleek notification feed for SaaS user dashboards
Present social media or streaming activity notifications
ai_summary: A sleek dark-themed notification center component featuring an animated phone mockup that displays real-time payment notifications and activity alerts. Includes smooth motion animations with hover states, notification stacking effects, and a modern fintech aesthetic with cyan accent colors. Ideal for dashboards, payment interfaces, and mobile-first notification systems.
